data.name: 性寶藏
data.detailed_description:
主角是名年輕冒險家愛德華·葛雷夫斯。他獨自駕船啟航，追尋那張眾人視為神話的古老地圖。歷經險惡航程與漫長搜尋，他抵達一座島嶼。在岩礁與古舊金箱間，他邂逅了斯嘉麗·摩根。這位女子長年被財富囚禁於此，以孤獨為代價存活至今。

兩人之間竄起火花，起初謹慎戒備，轉瞬卻燃成熾烈激情。愛德華此刻必須抉擇：是繼續追逐黃金而冒著迷失自我的風險，抑或承認自己早已尋得真正的珍寶？

他將抗拒詛咒財富的誘惑，抑或屈服於更為人性化的誘惑？

遊戲特色：
• 充滿海盜氛圍的冒險故事。
• 蘊藏秘密、個性鮮明且魅力十足的角色陣容。
• 黃金與激情交織的命運敘事。
• 融合浪漫情愫、幽默元素與直率場景的氛圍。
• 電影院級呈現，讓每個事件鮮活難忘。

data.short_description: 《性寶藏》是一款成人視覺小說。這場始於尋覓海盜寶藏的平凡旅程，逐漸演變成充滿激情、誘惑與意外發現的傳奇。主角為追尋傳說中船長的黃金而啟程，卻意外發現了超乎想像的驚奇。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 匈牙利文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: Sex Treasure
data.detailed_description:
The main character is a young adventurer named Edward Graves. He boards his ship and sets sail alone, following an old map that everyone considers mythical. After a dangerous voyage and a long search, he reaches an island. Among the rocks and ancient chests of gold, he meets Scarlett Morgan. She is a woman who has been trapped by these riches for a long time and has survived there at the cost of loneliness.

A connection flares up between them, starting out cautious and wary but soon growing into passion. Edward must now choose whether to continue the race for gold and risk losing himself or admit that he has already found the true treasure.

Will he resist the temptation of cursed riches, or succumb to a much more human temptation?

Game features:
• An adventure story with a pirate atmosphere.
• Characters with secrets, personality, and charisma.
• A story where gold and passion intertwine.
• An atmosphere of romance, humor, and candid scenes.
• A cinematic presentation that makes every event vivid and memorable.

data.short_description: Sex Treasure is an adult visual novel. What starts as an ordinary hunt for pirate treasure turns into a tale of passion, temptation, and unexpected discoveries. The hero sets out to find the legendary captain's gold, but instead, he finds something he didn't expect.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Hungarian, Greek, Danish, Indonesian, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows XP or higher
  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 400 MB available space

Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
